hf432d00dgc8cag4093gb108g8983a14f5db8: And what of my future, Master Halsin?
he01fee00gfae0g4c73gb596gdaf69d1d7d09: Perhaps you will prove yourself worthy of forgiveness. Perhaps not.
hdf4f1602g23f5g46cbgb10dg1f4dd8ec553b: With the shadows vanquished, healing can begin.
h1eb6c4c2g874bg4102g8389g0d0ebc97ea70: Do not forget who invited those shadows. You have much to learn still.
h2b8acd73g4eb9g4ddfg9858g72e6408f4bab: I sought strength in the shadows. May Silvanus forgive me.
h2a4f33c2g591cg418cg81aegbee244a633f8: At least you recognise your mistake. This is a beginning - a small one.
h45bad4f9g4032g4d53gbb23g7d0aa7d7ffb5: You imperiled the grove. I'm surprised you dare show your face.
h7a8f0fc9g5432g4f73gbe28g05b5719aeef9: You will make peace with all who seek shelter here. It is the will of Silvanus.
h972c3cf6gd444g4efcgafaegadb17240945f: Silvanus would not command us to invite rot into our midst.
h328d86f2g02d9g4d27g8659g5f9fc23a54e2: Oh child. You have drifted far from the Oak Father's teachings.
h69892c6dga4adg498dg90b6g017f00d2463e: And the outlanders? What of them?
hdea32fa7g08e8g4deagb3efgf70acfcf741e: They are our guests until they wish to leave - as I said as the day they arrived.
hb848a475g86c2g47dcgae35gceb816afa4aa: Have they blinded you to truth? Outsiders bring only chaos.
hd58c93e0g208cg43e9gb2e4g3a629493f430: And what have you brought? Harmony? Balance?
h0730d913g18e9g427cg90e7g5f3880cf9377: Then banish me. When the coming army marches, there will be none to protect you.
hd8821d09g336ag4a2dgae46g7e8aa601ed1e: You imperiled the grove - how dare you even look me in the eye.
h9a9cf2f6g044fg48afgb4b6g2cf6c8b19641: I did what I had to. A pity you don't see that.
h9ea43d49g7005g4233g8147gef7919f7bfa6: I thought I had been a good teacher to you. Clearly not.
